data.content:
Plan review — APPROVED.

Complete: plan covers all 8 ACs with commit references (fbfe76f docs, b8b9759 core+tests, d5ecb30 grammar, foolery c2756326/d23064d2/68a3a881).

Correct: lease-as-declared-source framing matches the contract; no "fallback" language in the plan or referenced commits.

Feasible: all work is already landed on origin/main of both repos; quality gates green (knots coverage 95.14%, foolery 2734 tests).

Invariants respected: plan touches only agent-identity flow; does not alter lease lifecycle, SQLite concurrency rules, or workflow state machine.

Test strategy: covered by tests_lease_deprecation (9 tests, each sink), cargo test suite (1111 unit + all integration), foolery test suite, and live smoke tests (V1/V2/V3) against the freshly built binary.

No security, performance, or maintainability concerns: deprecation warnings emit to stderr only; lease lookup is the same O(1) path already used for notes/handoffs.

Plan may advance to implementation.
